test_groups.product_surface: worker selection and building placement agency
construction, cancellation, refund, builder ownership, selection, HUD
goldmine gatherer saturation and economy scale
tower attack, target filtering, static-defense behavior, console stability

coverage_summary: goldmine gatherer cap remains stable at five active workers
default economy scale approaches five-worker mining saturation
completed tower damages enemy units inside range
tower does not damage allied units
tower does not move or chase while attacking
tower clears dead targets and can acquire a new enemy
tower ignores goldmine and non-combat resource targets
construction can stop, resume, cancel, refund, and clear builder ownership deterministically
worker can enter Building state from building edge without reaching blocked center
selected under-construction building cancel path leaves selection, rings, HUD, and command surface valid
building placement agency selects workers deterministically and clears placement state on cancel

test_contract_adjustments.summary: Updated stale command card slot assertion to match the current 4x4 / 16-slot command surface.

product_verdict.summary: The current A1 building gameplay contracts are stable enough to use as a baseline for a later Quaternius import packet. This does not approve any third-party runtime import.

remaining_blockers_for_import: Quaternius GLBs have not been copied into runtime asset paths.
AssetCatalog has not been pointed at Quaternius files.
Candidate team-color markers, attack points, and healthbar anchors have not been implemented in runtime.
The first import packet must rerun load-failure fallback proof and this gameplay smoke package after the minimal asset copy/catalog change.
No approved-for-import packet has been accepted.
